$comment: Self-derived finetype drift contract for source.edgar (the finetype_validate@1 gate checks the terminal Parquet against this in CHECK-ONLY mode). Regenerate with finetype (>=0.6.50): finetype profile -f build/edgar.parquet -o json-schema --stats | jq '{"$comment":...} + del(.properties[].pattern)'. Rationale: the per-type canonical 'pattern' regexes finetype emits encode idealised/inferred formats that legitimately-varied production data violates — here finetype types 'ticker' as a 2-letter geographic state_code and 'cik' as a strict numeric_code, whose regexes reject real exchange tickers and CIKs. The gate therefore enforces the OBSERVABLE envelope finetype measured — type, minLength/maxLength, numeric minimum/maximum, closed enum domains, and the x-finetype-* semantic labels — not the format ideal. So it is a pass-through on today's Run and a tripwire for future drift.
title: edgar
